title: U.S. CFTC moves to stop Kalshi from canceling trades as ordered by Michigan court
summary: The federal derivatives regulator, which oversees trading at Kalshi, argued it was inappropriate for Michigan to "bully" the firm into reversing trades.

title: Some U.S. Senate Democrats come out against Clarity Act, calling it a 'corrupt' bill
summary: Certain Democrats are taking an increasingly rigorous stand against the crypto market structure bill, which needs a significant number from their party to pass.

title: Binance bets on becoming a crypto 'super app' as stablecoins reshape growth
summary: Shunyet Jan, Binance’s head of spot trading and derivatives, said the exchange is focusing more on payments and financial services than on trading alone as it drives the next phase of its expansion.

title: The Clarity Act isn't a ticket to sanctions evasion, actually
summary: The bill, as currently drafted, has the power to stop sanctions evasion at scale, argues Ari Redbord, global head of policy at TRM Labs.

title: Mizuho downgrades Circle to underperform, cuts price target to $50 on Open USD threat
summary: The Japanese investment bank said Open USD's yield pass-through model could pressure Circle's margins by shifting more reserve income to distributors.
